yoy_performance.sql:
with current_season_games as (
select count(*) as game_count
from gamedata g
left join team ht on g.home_team_id = ht.team_id
left join team at on g.away_team_id = at.team_id
left join season s on g.season_id = s.season_id
where s.end_date >= date('now')
and s.career = 1
and s.playoff = 0
and (ht.name = :team or at.name = :team)
),
data as (
select
g.game_date
, g.game_status
, ht.name as home_team
, g.home_team_score
, at.name as away_team
, g.away_team_score
, s.season_name as season
, s.season_id
, s.end_date
, row_number() over (partition by g.season_id order by g.game_date) as game_seq
, case
when
(ht.name = :team and g.home_team_score > g.away_team_score) or (at.name = :team and g.home_team_score < g.away_team_score)
then
   1
else
   0
end as 'W'
, case
   when g.game_status like 'Final%' then
   case
      when (ht.name = :team and g.home_team_score < g.away_team_score) or (at.name = :team and g.home_team_score > g.away_team_score)
      then 1
      else 0
   end
   else 0
end as 'L'
, case
   when g.game_status like 'Final/OT%' then
   case
      when (ht.name = :team and g.home_team_score < g.away_team_score) or (at.name = :team and g.home_team_score > g.away_team_score)
      then 1
      else 0
   end
   else 0
end as 'OTL'
, case
   when g.game_status like '%SO%' then
   case
      when (ht.name = :team and g.home_team_score < g.away_team_score) or (at.name = :team and g.home_team_score > g.away_team_score)
      then 1
      else 0
   end
   else 0
end as 'SOL'
from gamedata g
left join team ht on g.home_team_id = ht.team_id
left join team at on g.away_team_id = at.team_id
left join season s on g.season_id = s.season_id
where (ht.name = :team or at.name = :team)
and s.career = 1
and s.playoff = 0
)
select d.season_id
, d.season
, sum(2*W+OTL+SOL) as 'Points'
, count(*) as 'Games'
, sum(W) as 'Wins'
, sum(L) as 'Losses'
, sum(OTL) as 'OTL'
, sum(SOL) as 'SOL'
from data d
where d.game_seq <= (select count(*) from gamedata g
                     left join team ht on g.home_team_id = ht.team_id
                     left join team at on g.away_team_id = at.team_id
                     left join season s on g.season_id = s.season_id
                     where s.end_date >= date('now')
                     and s.career = 1
                     and s.playoff = 0
                     and (ht.name = :team or at.name = :team))
group by d.season_id, d.season
order by d.season_id desc
limit 2
yoy_performance.title: Year over Year Performance
yoy_performance.description: Compares performance at same point in season - last completed season vs current/ongoing season

team_performance_by_day.sql:
with data as (
    select ht.name as home_team
    , at.name as away_team
    , g.game_date
    , g.home_team_score
    , g.away_team_score
    , g.game_status
    , case
        when ht.name = :team and g.home_team_score > g.away_team_score then 1
        when at.name = :team and g.home_team_score < g.away_team_score then 1
        else 0
    end as 'W'
    , case
        when ht.name = :team and g.game_status like 'Final' and g.home_team_score < g.away_team_score then 1
        when at.name = :team and g.game_status like 'Final' and g.home_team_score > g.away_team_score then 1
        else 0
    end as 'L'
    , case
        when ht.name = :team and (g.game_status like 'Final OT%' and g.game_status != 'Final SO') and g.home_team_score < g.away_team_score then 1
        when at.name = :team and (g.game_status like 'Final OT%' and g.game_status != 'Final SO') and g.home_team_score > g.away_team_score then 1
        else 0
    end as 'OTL'
    , case
        when ht.name = :team and g.game_status = 'Final SO' and g.home_team_score < g.away_team_score then 1
        when at.name = :team and g.game_status = 'Final SO' and g.home_team_score > g.away_team_score then 1
        else 0
    end as 'SOL'
from gamedata g
left join team ht on g.home_team_id = ht.team_id
left join team at on g.away_team_id = at.team_id
where (ht.name = :team or at.name = :team)
and g.season_id = :season_id)

select
    :team as team,
    game_date,
    SUM(W) OVER (ORDER BY game_date) as wins,
    SUM(L) OVER (ORDER BY game_date) as losses,
    SUM(OTL) OVER (ORDER BY game_date) as otl,
    SUM(SOL) OVER (ORDER BY game_date) as sol,
    SUM(W + L + OTL + SOL) OVER (ORDER BY game_date) as games_played,
    SUM(W * 2 + OTL + SOL) OVER (ORDER BY game_date) as points
from data
order by game_date;
team_performance_by_day.title: Team Performance By Day
team_performance_by_day.description: Returns cumulative performance of a team by day. Query the 'available_seasons' view to find the season_id for your desired season.
